title: Smoothie
description: Want to squeeze every frame possible out of your game? Say no more!
body:
![Smoothie](https://i.imgur.com/MpHY4U5.png)

## 🔥 Get the best performance out of your game!
With performance enhancing mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Starlight and many more, your gameplay will be smoother than ever!

## 🔎 Used to OptiFine Features? No problem!
Press C to zoom, use your favorite resource packs with all their fancy connected textures and animations, drag and drop your favorite shaderpack to make Minecraft look absolutely stunning, all that with much better performance than OptiFine!

## 🔐 Chat safely!
With the mod No Chat Reports, your messages are anonymous once again. No more Mojang spying!

## 💡 Tip:
If you're going to use a shaderpack (I recommend [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)) that has dynamic lights, it is recommended to disable LambDynamicLights to ensure the best performance :)
